query: SAG-AFTRA Interactive Media Agreement 2025 compensation increase 15.17% November 2025 3% effective date implementation

mako.raw:
{"query":"SAG-AFTRA Interactive Media Agreement 2025 compensation increase 15.17% November 2025 3% effective date implementation","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1448,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.sagaftra.org/contracts-industry-resources/interactive/2025-interactive-media-video-game-agreement","title":"2025 Interactive Media Video Game Agreement","content":"The contract has now be submitted to the membership for ratification.
If the contract is not ratified, the National Executive Director and Chief Negotiator, with the advice and consent of the National Interactive Media Agreement Negotiating Committee, is delegated the authority by the National Board to suspend and/or continue the strike, whether as to some or all of the employers, or as to some or all of the productions affected by the strike.
For the Interactive Media Agreement (video game contract), SAG-AFTRA bargains collectively with the following companies: Activision Productions Inc., Blindlight LLC, Disney Character Voices Inc., Electronic Arts Productions Inc., Formosa Interactive LLC, Insomniac Games Inc., Llama Productions LLC, Take 2 Productions Inc. and WB Games Inc."},{"url":"https://deadline.com/2025/07/sag-aftra-video-game-agreement-approved-strike-1236453741/","title":"SAG-AFTRA Approves Video Game Deal In Official End To 11-Month Strike","content":"Jul 9, 2025 — The agreement provides compounded increases in performer compensation at a rate of 15.17%, plus additional 3% increases in Novembers 2025, 2026 ...Read more
SAG-AFTRA members have ratified the 2025 Interactive Media Agreement by an overwhelming majority, signifying an official conclusion to the nearly yearlong video game strike that first began in July of last year.
Duncan Crabtree-Ireland, SAG-AFTRA National Executive Director & Chief Negotiator, added, “All of us at SAG-AFTRA would like to extend our deepest appreciation to the video game performers and allies who endured a great deal of sacrifice throughout the 11-month strike.
On behalf of the video game producers that are party to the agreement, spokesperson Audrey Cooling stated: “We are pleased that SAG-AFTRA members have ratified a new Interactive Media Agreement, which delivers historic wage increases, industry-leading AI protections, and enhanced health and safety measures for performers."},{"url":"https://ipandmedialaw.fkks.com/post/102ksuq/new-sag-aftra-2025-interactive-media-agreement-approved-by-members","title":"New SAG-AFTRA 2025 Interactive Media Agreement Approved by Members, Emma Smizer","content":"Jul 11, 2025 — All wages are increased by a compounded 15.7%, plus an added 3% annual increase beginning November 2025, November 2026, and November 2027.
The 2025 IMA will provide increased performer compensation, among other added protections.
Health & Retirement: Health and retirement contributions increase by 0.5% (going up to 17% upon ratification, and later 17.5% after October 31, 2026)."},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2024%E2%80%932025_SAG-AFTRA_video_game_strike","title":"2024–2025 SAG-AFTRA video game strike - Wikipedia","content":"In November 2022, the Interactive Media Agreement expired and was subsequently extended on a monthly basis.
On July 25, 2024, SAG-AFTRA president Fran Drescher and chief negotiator Duncan Crabtree-Ireland announced that SAG-AFTRA would go on strike against major video game publishers.
The national board approved of the new agreement on June 12."},{"url":"https://www.comicsbeat.com/video-game-industry-actors-pass-sag-aftra-interactive-media-agreement/","title":"Video game industry actors pass SAG-AFTRA Interactive Media Agreement","content":"On July 9, SAG-AFTRA reached a deal with video game studios, and the 2025 SAG-AFTRA Interactive Media Agreement was passed by a vote of 95.04% to 4.96%.
“The agreement provides compounded increases in performer compensation at a rate of 15.17% upon ratification, plus additional 3% increases in November 2025, November 2026, and November 2027.
The health & retirement contribution rates to the AFTRA Retirement Fund will now be raised from 16.5% to 17% and then to 17.5% in October 2026,” stated the SAG-AFTRA press release.
SAG-AFTRA President Fran Drescher said, “This deal achieves important progress around AI protections, and progress is the name of the game!"},{"url":"https://www.sagaftra.org/sites/default/files/2025-06/2025%20Interactive%20Media%20%28Video%20Game%29%20Agreement%20Summary.pdf","title":"2025 Interactive Media (Video Game) Agreement Summary ...","content":"a. 15.17% effective upon ratification b. 3% effective November 1, 2025. SAG-AFTRA IMA to increase the “Additional Compensation” amounts … 2025 INTERACTIVE ...11 pages"},{"url":"https://www.sagaftra.org/sites/default/files/2025-2028%20Interactive%20Media%20Agreement%20Wage%20Table.pdf","title":"Interactive Media Agreement Wage Table","content":"2025 Interactive Media Agreement Rate 15.17% 3% 3% Day Performer (including solo/duo singers) $843.50. Solo/Duo $3,543.25 $3,649.50. Actors $189.00 $194.75 $ ...3 pages"}]}
